title: Doing the right thing, the Costco way.
description: Costco's Climate Action Plan and ESR framework cover climate, food sustainability, natural resources, people, and governance. We extend it locally in India.

goals.title: Net-zero by 2050
goals.body: Costco committed to net-zero greenhouse-gas emissions across the value chain by 2050, with science-based interim targets.

goals.title: −39% Scope 1 + 2 by 2030
goals.body: Absolute reduction in operational emissions vs a 2020 baseline — SBTi-approved.

goals.title: 100% renewable electricity by 2035
goals.body: Steady transition of purchased electricity globally; 21% achieved in calendar year 2023.

pillars.title: Environment
pillars.body: Energy-efficient campuses, reduced single-use plastics, and circular IT to lower e-waste.

pillars.title: Social
pillars.body: Education, skilling, and community outreach with NGOs across Telangana.

pillars.title: Governance
pillars.body: Robust ethics, anti-bribery, data protection, and supplier diligence aligned with Costco global.
